meaning: n.不和谐,不协调,不和睦,冲突
examples: Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are inharmony.
I can graze, ruminate, and work over my cud, inharmony with nature, and get milked gently on schedule by WandaPudnick's Kiehl 's-moisturized hands.
Improper layout, color and style of furniture will not only provide non-beauty, inharmony and non-practicability but also bring a lot of inconvenience to our life.
